name: Parry Lab — monster reactions (D-MON-5)
description: Bench for the Parry reaction. Trade melee blows with the Knight (+2 AC), Gladiator (+3) and Erinyes (+4): whenever one of your attacks would hit by a small margin, the monster spends its reaction to add its AC bonus and turn that hit into a miss — you'll see 'uses Parry — the attack is parried to a miss!' in the log. It's once per round and melee-only, and it can't stop a hit that clears the raised AC or a natural-20 crit. (It fires only on marginal hits, so it won't trigger every swing.)
